subject: [DMAAP][MR] Update hardcoded certificates
commit_message:
[DMAAP][MR] Update hardcoded certificates

Instead of hardcoding certificates inside the container, add them into
helm charts, so it's easier to update.

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1547
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I7fcb8831539d8d9d5d25bcaae44a3c66672f7b1a
(cherry picked from commit e5b6ffc663a2314fd545aa540cbdee6380adf00b)

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-guilin-commit-lint/82/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-guilin-commit-lint/82/ )
